headline: Motorola Solutions: Another M&A Deal As Appeal Is Improving
summary: Motorola Solutions reported a strong Q1 with 7% sales growth, 6% EPS growth, and an 11% YoY backlog increase to $15.7B. Read more on MSI stock here.

headline: Nvidia's new PC chips represent CEO Huang's bid to win at every layer of AI stack
summary: Nvidia's announced entry into the PC chip market sent shares of AMD, Intel and Qualcomm lower as Wall Street recognized the threat.
